_comment: question-insert sites that do NOT set draft_status. Each entry MUST have reason + resolves_when {kind,ref,expected_by}. NULLâ‰ˇactive is the legal semantics for these writers (the question IS an active pool item). embedded/teaching also set draft_status explicitly post-YUK-350-L2 â€” kept here as harmless-redundant (chain-merge guard); the audit silently passes an allowlisted-AND-explicit file. See docs/design/2026-05-15-data-assumptions.md.

src/capabilities/ingestion/server/auto-e.reason: Auto-enrolled questions are active pool items by design â€” NULLâ‰ˇactive is correct; they enter the review pool immediately.

resolves_when.ref: permanent: auto-enroll questions are intentionally active (NULLâ‰ˇactive); revisit only if a draft-then-promote flow is introduced for auto-enroll

src/capabilities/ingestion/api/import.ts.reason: Imported questions are user-provided active pool items â€” NULLâ‰ˇactive is correct.

resolves_when.ref: permanent: imported questions are intentionally active (NULLâ‰ˇactive)

src/capabilities/ingestion/api/mistakes..reason: Mistake-recorded questions are active pool items (the user got them wrong; they belong in review) â€” NULLâ‰ˇactive is correct.

resolves_when.ref: permanent: mistake questions are intentionally active (NULLâ‰ˇactive)

src/server/questions/parts.ts.reason: Paper/quiz part questions are active pool items written as part of an assembled paper â€” NULLâ‰ˇactive is correct.

resolves_when.ref: permanent: paper part questions are intentionally active (NULLâ‰ˇactive)

src/server/boss/handlers/embedded_check_.reason: Container-only embedded checks now set draft_status='draft' explicitly (YUK-350 L2). Kept here as a harmless-redundant chain-merge guard so the L2->L4 chain never fails on either order; the audit silently passes an allowlisted-AND-explicit file.

src/capabilities/copilot/server/teaching.reason: Container-only teaching checks now set draft_status='draft' explicitly (YUK-350 L2). Kept here as a harmless-redundant chain-merge guard; the audit silently passes an allowlisted-AND-explicit file.
